title: Travelers Reborn
description: A 300+ mods Pack with nothing but adventure and creativity way past what you've experienced before
body:
Travlers Reborn is a complex modpack with a focus on **Optimization**, **Exploration**, **Combat**, and **QoL**. 

**IMPORTANT** As of Verison 1.0.0.0 you must completely reinstall the modpack as it was completely changed

It's meant to work great with shaders and provide large rendering for the best views.

A major part of this is Survival Aspects without constant needless stress and
The Configurations you can make to support your playstyle. You can also enjoy the custom made additions and compats made from us!

It recieves constant updates to fix bugs, update mods, and keep performance and its max.

Join the Discord and learn about the server for more!
